paragraphGroups.chapterVoiceIdentity: Chapter 1 voice law: embodied witness-order pressure, no system-language, no theory-surface, no generic literary smoothing.
paragraphGroups.localConsciousnessTexture: Alexis attention=threat-first scan of faces, doors, and pauses; mediation=notices threat-first scan of faces, doors, and pauses; rejects threat-first scan of faces, doors, and pauses framing | naming-avoidance=avoids naming risk directly; speaks through objects and gesture; omission=withholds fear of being misread; names consequence through movement not thesis | social-reading=reads silence debt before explicit claims; misreads=Assumes silence means consent rather than tactical delay.; distortion=filters events through betrayal or unbuffered threat inside trusted structures | decision=risk-minimizing; delays commitment until signal confidence rises; conflict=treating suspicion as external certainty; only escalates after embodied evidence shifts
stabilizationRules: Anchor every paragraph in body/perception before inference.
Block abstract explanatory clauses unless transformed into movement, silence, or object handling.
Keep emotion indirect: posture, pause, and misreading; do not narrate interior thesis.
Maintain strict lawful withholding: no resolution language, no summary voice.
